title: Xtra Crisp Tunisian Teque os Fritters
description: Garlicky and crispy Tunisian fritters featuring pre-fried teque os, perfect for a snack or appetizer. This Jain-friendly dish is sure to impress.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the chickpea flour, cornstarch, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the minced garlic to the flour mixture and stir well.
Dip each pre-fried teque os into the flour mixture, coating evenly.
Fry the coated teque os in the hot oil for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the Xtra Crisp Tunisian Teque os Fritters hot and enjoy.
Repeat the frying process in batches if necessary, to prevent overcrowding the pan.
Keep the fritters warm in a low-temperature oven while frying the remaining batches.
